response.overview: In a hidden place, beyond a door no one dares to open, a dark plan is about to unfold. When the Great Wizard unleashes his power, you will be swept into a vortex of pure madness and begin a journey you will never forget. You will soar over dizzying mountains, face colossal dragons ready to unleash their fury, dive into digital worlds where gigantic fruits rain down like meteors, rush through torrential forests, unstoppable rapids, and deep space ruled by an insatiable black hole.  But there is one thing the Great Wizard did not foresee. A force greater than any spell; a force that knows no fear; an energy no magic can extinguish: the fun of Prezzemolo!!!
response.title: Prezzemolo e l'Enigma Svelato
